## Description
A clear and concise description of what this PR changes/adds/fixes and the context around it.

## Related Issues
Fixes #[issue-number] (or links to related issues)

## Checklist
Please verify the following:
- [ ] My code follows the code style guidelines (run `cargo fmt` and `npm run lint`).
- [ ] I have run compiler and linting checks (`cargo clippy`).
- [ ] I have tested these changes locally, and verified they don't break existing functionality (run `node tests/api_test.js`).
- [ ] I have added/updated documentation if applicable.
- [ ] For UI changes, I have attached screenshots/recordings showcasing the difference.

## Screenshots / Video Demonstrations
(Optional: Include any visual representations of the changes made)
